ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hubs" (
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hub */,
  "hub_name" TEXT /* Name of the hub */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hub */,
  "hub_type" TEXT /* Type of hub (e.g., physical, financial) */,
  "hub_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the hub in MWh */,
  "hub_status" TEXT /* Current status of the hub (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the price belongs to */,
  "high" REAL /* High energy price for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Low energy price for the day */,
  "wtd_avg_index" REAL /* Weighted average index for the day */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "vol_mwh" INTEGER /* Volume of energy traded in MWh */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., exchange, broker) */,
  "price_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the price (e.g., market, bid-ask) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility record */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the volatility belongs to */,
  "annualized_volatility" REAL /* Annualized volatility for the hub */,
  "volatility_date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility record */,
  "volatility_source" TEXT /* Source of the volatility data (e.g., historical, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward, stable) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., technical analysis, fundamental analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_price" REAL /* Forecasted price for the hub */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the forecast (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "trader_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trader (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "trader_department" TEXT /* Department the trader belongs to (e.g., trading, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the trade belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "trade_counterparty" TEXT /* Counterparty of the trade (e.g., other trader, institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who holds the position */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the position belongs to */,
  "position_date" TEXT /* Date of the position */,
  "position_size" INTEGER /* Size of the position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., long, short) */,
  "position_status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk record */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the risk belongs to */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at risk for the hub */,
  "risk_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk record */,
  "risk_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the risk (e.g., historical, Monte Carlo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "hub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hub the compliance belongs to */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status for the hub (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance record */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Details of the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_hub_id FOREIGN KEY ("hub_id") REFERENCES hubs ("hub_id")
)
